recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Khoobsurat
recommendations.overview: A vibrant, hopelessly romantic physiotherapist meets a handsome young Rajput prince who is the complete opposite of her – and is engaged to someone else.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Everyone Says I Love You
recommendations.overview: A New York girl sets her father up with a beautiful woman in a shaky marriage while her half sister gets engaged.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Picture Perfect
recommendations.overview: A young advertising executive's life becomes increasingly complicated when, in order to impress her boss, she pretends to be engaged to a man she has just met.

recommendations.title: Made of Honor
recommendations.overview: Tom and Hannah have been platonic friends for 10 years. He's a serial dater, while she wants marriage but hasn't found Mr. Right. Just as Tom is starting to think that he is relationship material after all, Hannah gets engaged. When she asks Tom to b

recommendations.title: Happiest Season
recommendations.overview: A young woman's plans to propose to her girlfriend while at her family's annual holiday party are upended when she discovers her partner hasn't yet come out to her conservative parents.

recommendations.title: Without Saying Goodbye
recommendations.overview: The opposite lives of a workaholic architect and a fiery artist are upended when their chance encounter in breathtaking Peru shifts their views on life.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: P.S. I Still Love You
recommendations.overview: Lara Jean and Peter have just taken their romance from pretend to officially real when another recipient of one of her love letters enters the picture.
